ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "bill_number" TEXT /* Bill number (e.g., HB1842) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the bill */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the bill's content and intent */,
  "introduction_date" TEXT /* Date the bill was introduced */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bill in the legislative process */,
  "enactment_date" TEXT /* Date the bill was enacted, if applicable */,
  "referral_sheet" TEXT /* Referral sheet number associated with the bill */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the bill (e.g., Health, Environment) */,
  "sponsor_ids" TEXT /* List of IDs of the sponsors of the bill */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the bill */,
  "public_comments_enabled" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if public comments are allowed for the bill */,
  "public_comments_count" INTEGER /* Total number of public comments received */,
  "last_public_comment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last public comment */,
  "enactment_status" TEXT /* Detailed status of the bill's enactment (e.g., Signed into law, Vetoed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_sponsor_ids FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_ids") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "chairperson" TEXT /* Name of the chairperson of the committee */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the committee */,
  "committee_type" TEXT /* Type of committee (e.g., Standing, Special) */,
  "meeting_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of committee meetings */,
  "next_meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the next committee meeting */,
  "last_meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the last committee meeting */,
  "meeting_location" TEXT /* Location of committee meetings */,
  "committee_members" TEXT /* List of IDs of committee members */,
  "committee_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the committee's role and responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill the report is associated with */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_link" TEXT /* Link to the report document */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the report was published */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Fiscal, Impact, Legal) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Final) */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the report author */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the report */,
  "public_access" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the report is publicly accessible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referrals" (
  "referral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referral */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill being referred */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee the bill is referred to */,
  "referral_date" TEXT /* Date the referral was made */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position taken by the committee (e.g., Monitor, Comment) */,
  "referral_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the referral */,
  "referral_status" TEXT /* Status of the referral (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "referral_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the referral (e.g., Forwarded to another committee, Returned to the floor) */,
  "referral_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes on the referral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referrals_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referrals_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Introduced, Referred, Deferred) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "status_order" INTEGER /* Order of the status in the bill lifecycle */,
  "next_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the next possible status in the lifecycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., legislator, staff, public) */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., Legislator, Staff, Public) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Detailed role of the user (e.g., Chairperson, Committee Member) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill the feedback is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback submitted */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., Support, Concern, Question) */,
  "feedback_category" TEXT /* Category of feedback (e.g., Financial, Social) */,
  "feedback_status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., Reviewed, Pending) */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Response to the feedback */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_feedback_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bill_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill the version is for */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the bill */,
  "amendment_date" TEXT /* Date the amendment was made */,
  "amendment_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the amendments made */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., Draft, Final) */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., Active, Archived) */,
  "version_changes" TEXT /* Detailed list of changes made in the version */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* List of IDs of users who reviewed the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bill_versions_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bill_versions_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_records" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill voted on */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee that voted */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date the vote occurred */,
  "vote_result" TEXT /* Result of the vote (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  "vote_counts" TEXT /* Count of votes for and against */,
  "voting_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., Roll Call, Voice) */,
  "voting_method" TEXT /* Method of voting (e.g., Electronic, Paper) */,
  "voting_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes on the voting process */,
  "voting_participants" TEXT /* List of IDs of users who participated in the vote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_records_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_records_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fiscal_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiscal impact assessment */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill assessed */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year for which the impact is estimated */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the bill */,
  "impact_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the fiscal impact */,
  "impact_type" TEXT /* Type of fiscal impact (e.g., Direct, Indirect) */,
  "impact_source" TEXT /* Source of the fiscal impact (e.g., State Budget, Federal Grants) */,
  "impact_details" TEXT /* Detailed explanation of the fiscal impact */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* List of IDs of users who reviewed the fiscal impact */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the fiscal impact was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fiscal_impact_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fiscal_impact_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill sponsored */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_role" TEXT /* Role of the sponsor (e.g., Representative, Senator) */,
  "sponsor_district" TEXT /* District of the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_type" TEXT /* Type of sponsor (e.g., Primary, Co-sponsor) */,
  "sponsor_contact" TEXT /* Additional contact information (e.g., phone number, address) */,
  "sponsor_biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_committees" TEXT /* List of IDs of committees the sponsor is a member of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsors_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)
